description.en: Returns the list of human-readable names that makes up the category for thisEventTypeInfo(for example,"Java Virtual Machine"or"Garbage Collector").

description.en: Returns the list of predefined configurations for this Java Virtual Machine (JVM).

description.en: Returns the textual representation of the configuration associated with thisConfigurationInfo, typically the contents of the configuration file that was used to create the configuration.

description.en: Returns a short sentence that describes the configuration associated with thisConfigurationInfo(for example,"Low overhead configuration safe for continuous use in production environments".

description.en: Returns a short sentence or two describing the event type associated with thisEventTypeInfo, for example"Garbage collection performed by the JVM"".

description.en: Returns the description of the setting associated thisSettingDescriptorInfo(for example,"The duration an event must exceed to be be recorded").

description.en: Returns destination path where data, for the recording associated with thisRecordingInfo, should be written when the recording stops, ornullif the recording should not be written.

description.en: Returns if the recording associated with thisRecordingInfoshould be dumped to file when the JVM exits.

description.en: Returns the desired duration, measured in seconds, of the recording associated with thisRecordingInfo, or0if no duration has been set.
